---
name: Technical Task
about: Implementation task created by Developer or Technical Architect
title: '[TASK] '
labels: 'type: task, role: developer'
assignees: ''
---

## Task Description
[Clear description of what needs to be implemented]

## Related User Story
Implements #[issue-number]

## Technical Approach
High-level approach for implementation:
- [ ] Step 1
- [ ] Step 2
- [ ] Step 3

## Subtasks (Check off as completed)
- [ ] Subtask 1 (e.g., Create service class)
- [ ] Subtask 2 (e.g., Implement business logic)
- [ ] Subtask 3 (e.g., Write unit tests)
- [ ] Subtask 4 (e.g., Update documentation)

## TDD Checklist
- [ ] Write failing tests first (RED phase)
- [ ] Implement minimal code to pass tests (GREEN phase)
- [ ] Refactor code for quality (REFACTOR phase)
- [ ] Achieve code coverage ≥ 80%
- [ ] All tests passing

## Files to Create/Modify
- `path/to/file1.java` - [Description]
- `path/to/file2.java` - [Description]

## Estimated Effort
[Hours or Story Points - e.g., "8 hours" or "5 points"]

## Dependencies
- [ ] Blocked by #[issue-number] - [Description]
- [ ] Requires #[issue-number] to be completed first

## Technical Notes
[Optional: Additional technical considerations, architecture references, or ADR links]

## Definition of Done
- [ ] All subtasks completed
- [ ] All tests passing (unit + integration)
- [ ] Code coverage ≥ 80%
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, API docs, etc.)
- [ ] No linting errors or warnings
- [ ] PR merged
- [ ] Issue closed

---

**Branch:** Will create `feature/[issue-number]-brief-description`
**PR:** Will link with `Closes #[this-issue-number]` and `Related to #[user-story-number]`
